feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to concatenate single field values into single row value in sap abap
entry.content:
For Example,

I have 5 Order Number, each order number has five status. In this I'm displaying released order status number but I need to concatenate all the order status including released and should display in ALV for that particular order number.

Can Anyone Help me with this to concatenate this into another field.

Order Number is from AUFK table and Order status is from JEST table and TJ02T Table.

I have attached example photo below. Kindly help me to solve this.

entry.title: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need to create a customizing table where I can insert an hide password (for example ****** )

Then inside a custom report I have to retrieve the encoded field from the table and use it.

how can I do it?

entry.title: CL_HTTP_CLIENT Multipart - XML as string and a seperate XML file
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

im currently implementing a Webservice. I have to transfer a XML string and a seperate XML file via POST request. I'm currently struggeling with the multipart handling for the XML string. 

Does anybody have a working code example? I already tried adding multipart data with set_form_field and set_cdata for the XML string. 

The HTTP Request should look like this: 

 

POST /documents?template_name=library%2sample.template&document_name=ps_demo08&user_id=TechUser HTTP/1.1
Authorization: Bearer {{bearer_token}}
Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: {{apiKey}}
User: Technical User 
Password: Technical Password
Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=---011000010111000001101001
Host: host.net
Content-Length: 308

-----011000010111000001101001
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="xml"

<?xml version="1.0" encodiing= "utf-8"?>
-----011000010111000001101001
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="zugferd"

\\share\User\Downloads\sample.xml
-----011000010111000001101001--

 

 

Thanks for helping.

entry.title: Eclipse BW Bridge Project: Logon to the service instance has failed.
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the latest Eclipse version (2024-12) installed with the latest ADT and MDT. I try to add a BW bridge project by extracting the URL from the service key. I get prompted to login and do so successfully on an external browser window. As soon as I do, I get an error in Eclipse "Logon to the service instance has failed." I can't find anything related to it elsewhere. Has anyone come across it?

entry.title: Adobe Forms Barcode is printed over Border
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

I have following problem in SAP transaction SFP I try to print a barcode. The barcode is in a subform that is not wider than the page, I've already reduced the barcode to a small size. 

But it still gets printed over the edge. I dont get the problem, I've tried a lot but the result is always the same. I use a 128 Barcode. It get declared as a GS1-128 Barcode.

In Designer:

In print view(When printed from zebra label printer its also over the edge)

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Automatically overflow last row of table to next page in Smartform
entry.content:
Experts,

I have a smartform which prints Consumption data for a Contract account. Data is displayed in a table which can contain dynamic no of rows. I display contract account name in one of the table columns. Few accounts have shorted names and few accounts have longer names. So the height of each row in the table can vary based on this. 

Images attached with name Page 1 shows the last row of the table which is partially displayed in that page. Rest of the data is displayed in the following page. 

Is there a way I can automatically move the last row of the smartform in each page to next page so that the whole record will be shown in 1 page. 

NOTE: I can't say how many rows will come in 1 page as the height of each row can vary based on customer name. Some page might show 20 rows, and some might show 24. So if I say that exactly at the 20th row, move the data to next page, then there will be a lot of whitespace in a few pages which is not desirable. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: In editable alv i am using MT_MOD_CELLS data is incorrect
entry.content:
Hi Experts 


I have created a editable alv report and i am getting the value using MT_MOD_CELLS in that i am getting a wrong value .


for example 
value A = 9000 given in the output of the report 

but its taking 90.00

entry.title: Virtual element field displays but is duplicated for every work item
entry.content:
Greetings all, first let me apologize as I am extremely new to ABAP, hence forgive my confusion. I am currently experimenting with an abap class that determines the current approver for work items. I am using virtual elements to determine this field which is displayed in my cds view as follows:

@ObjectModel.readOnly: true
@ObjectModel.virtualElement: true
@ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:Z_TEST_CLASS'
cast('' as abap.sstring( 12 )) as CurrentApprover,

My virtual element displays a current approver in my fiori elements preview, however, the same user is shown for every work item and I am completely stumped as to where I am going wrong. From my understanding the code should work correctly as I have:
 - Used the correct virtual element interfaces and methods
- Specified an internal table of type of my CDS view
- moved it_original-data into my local table
- have specified the fields that are required in my get_calculation_info method

Could anyone provide some insights please, my code is as follows:

CLASS z_test_class DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_sadl_exit .
    INTERFACES if_sadl_exit_calc_element_read .

  PROTECTED SECTION.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF Z_SCA_CUSTOM_REPORT,
             ApplicationObjectID TYPE swwflexproc-appl_obj_id,
             ScenarioID          TYPE swwflexproc-scenario_id,
             ScenarioVersion     TYPE swwflexproc-scenario_version,
             WorkItemID          TYPE swwwihead-wi_id,
             CreationDate        TYPE swwwihead-wi_cd,
             CurrentAgent        TYPE swwwihead-wi_aagent,
             Status              TYPE string,
             DaysInInbox         TYPE i,
             Comments            TYPE swwwihead-wi_text,
             CurrentApprover     TYPE string,
           END OF Z_SCA_CUSTOM_REPORT.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: lt_ihead_table TYPE TABLE OF swwwihead,
          ls_ihead_data  TYPE swwwihead,
          lt_userwi_table TYPE TABLE OF swwuserwi,
          ls_userwi_data TYPE swwuserwi,
          lv_currentapprover TYPE string.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS z_test_class IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_sadl_exit_calc_element_read~calculate.
    DATA: lt_calculated_data TYPE TABLE OF Z_SCA_CUSTOM_REPORT,
          ls_calculated_data TYPE Z_SCA_CUSTOM_REPORT.

    " Copy original data to calculated data table
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING it_original_data TO lt_calculated_data.

    LOOP AT lt_calculated_data INTO ls_calculated_data.
      " Load work items that are not completed into table
      SELECT * FROM swwwihead INTO TABLE lt_ihead_table
        WHERE wi_stat <> 'COMPLETED' AND wi_stat <> 'CANCELLED' AND wi_type = 'W'.

      " Check for approvals
      IF lt_ihead_table IS NOT INITIAL.
        SELECT * FROM swwuserwi INTO TABLE lt_userwi_table
          FOR ALL ENTRIES IN lt_ihead_table
          WHERE wi_id = lt_ihead_table-wi_id.

        " Delete unwanted user IDs using a loop
        LOOP AT lt_userwi_table INTO ls_userwi_data.
          IF ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'BGRFC*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'S4H_*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'SAP_*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'MDG_*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'SERV_*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'BPINST'.
            DELETE lt_userwi_table INDEX sy-tabix.
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

        LOOP AT lt_ihead_table INTO ls_ihead_data.
          READ TABLE lt_userwi_table INTO ls_userwi_data WITH KEY wi_id = ls_ihead_data-wi_id.
          IF sy-subrc = 0 AND ls_userwi_data-user_id IS NOT INITIAL.
            lv_currentapprover = ls_userwi_data-user_id.
          ELSE.
            lv_currentapprover = 'No current approver found'.
          ENDIF.

          " Assigning the calculated values to the virtual elements
          ls_calculated_data-currentapprover = lv_currentapprover.
          MODIFY lt_calculated_data FROM ls_calculated_data.
        ENDLOOP.
      ELSE.
        LOOP AT lt_ihead_table INTO ls_ihead_data.
          CONCATENATE 'Awaiting approval by:' ls_ihead_data-wi_aagent INTO lv_currentapprover.
          ls_calculated_data-currentapprover = lv_currentapprover.
          MODIFY lt_calculated_data FROM ls_calculated_data.
        ENDLOOP.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

    " Return the calculated data
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING lt_calculated_data TO ct_calculated_data.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD if_sadl_exit_calc_element_read~get_calculation_info.
    IF line_exists( it_requested_calc_elements[ table_line = 'CurrentApprover' ] ).
      APPEND 'wi_id' TO et_requested_orig_elements.
      APPEND 'wi_aagent' TO et_requested_orig_elements.
      APPEND 'user_id' TO et_requested_orig_elements.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Any object to change prices of shipping costs? (ie a BAPI for VI02)
entry.content:
It seems we are a lot different of almost every company in this world (and some of the others) and we cannot use the automatic calculation of shipping costs.

So, I need to create the cost with each subitem's conditions customized.

I've been looking around (and in other places) for things like "BAPI VI01" "FM VI02" "shipping cost change" and any other query string that I've been able to think of with no success.

The most nearly approach I found is a post here with a lot of calls to SD_SCD* function modules, and it seems even more complicated than the batch input I have in mind (in which I must control different tabs, stripes, positions without positioning buttons, etc).

Has anyone found a better approach?
(and no, to win the lottery and leave my position is not an option)

entry.title: Developer in 2024 : which is the best way ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm an Abap expert (classic or object etc). I've done 2 upgrade in this position. I know also Fiori free style and a little of Fiori element. 
Now I can influence development approach in several context but I'm a bit confused in what is the good approach to create a Fiori App.

And now you can do : 

for back-end : classic (SEGW), RAP, CAP and also CAP in the cloud
for front-end : Fiori freestyle, Fiori elements, Full-stack with productivity tools, annotations on cds

And I suppose I forgot options. Plus the configuration of the customer : private cloud, on premise... Plus the knowledge of the IT company.

I know I have to progress for CAP but is it the same in back-end and btp.

I'll appreciate any advice.

Christophe

entry.title: Enhancement for CK11N.
entry.content:
HI,

Need Enhancement for CK11N.

Business requirement : Labor PC Rate (CA03 ) change while CK11N execute. 

 

Thanks.

Pradip Patel

entry.title: Eclipse ADT doesn't show the Active ATC results with S/4 HANA 2023 SP02
entry.content:
Hi All,

I couldn't find any blog or questions answered for this issue. So had to ask it myself.

One of our clients have the latest S/4 HANA 2023 SP02 machine, and we run ATC with the variant S4HANA_READINESS_2023_NO_FLE in the same system (no remote). The run is fine and show as active in the results in ATC transaction. However, it doesn't show up in the eclipse ADT (Also updated to the latest versions). All the relevant authorizations are given for the users.

The 'Older' results showing are the ATC run on specific objects only, but not the overall run that we do in scheduled BG job.

Another similar question was https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/can-t-show-up-atc-central-check-result-browser-in-adt/qaq-p/12275606, but it was specific to remote ATC on older release.

Why does it not work on the most recent release as well? Any ideas please?

entry.title: Finance F-53 with DMS: "Document XXX/XXXXX/XXX/XX does not exist"
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a enhancement for a custom button in various Tcodes ME*, VA*, VF*, FB*, F-*, etc. which display a popup that create DMS document for the respective document and allows attachments upload.

The enhancement is working fine in almost all cases, except for only one Tcode - F-53 that also in the Posting screen of open items.

Here when user clicks on our button, it will create a new DMS. I have checked this and in debug mode, the document is created using the below BAPI

  CLEAR ls_return.
  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2'
    EXPORTING
      documentdata    = ls_documentdata
    IMPORTING
      documenttype    = lv_documenttype
      documentnumber  = lv_documentnumber
      documentpart    = lv_documentpart
      documentversion = lv_documentversion
      return          = ls_return.

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
    EXPORTING
      wait = 'X'.

Here the document is created successfully and document number, type, part, version is generated.
Just below this we have a get document BAPI

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_DOCUMENT_GETDETAIL2'
    EXPORTING
      documenttype    = lv_documenttype
      documentnumber  = lv_documentnumber
      documentpart    = lv_documentpart
      documentversion = lv_documentversion
    IMPORTING
      documentdata    = es_document_data
    TABLES
      documentfiles   = et_document_files.

This BAPI returns error that the document does't exist. Now I can understand if this happens in all scenarios but it is only happening in F-53 and specifically in the Posting of Open item screen.

System Message: 26/003

Any help is appreciated and thanks.

entry.title: show only one value which is post on latest
entry.content:
Greetings!!!

Can anyone give a suggestion to get a solution.

as per selection screen parameter i fetch data which is in internal table. I need to select only one value which is the max (budat) based on matnr  & werks.

only one data exist in a single plant. how can i solve it.

I try to use read statement as well as At new, but desired result not coming.

internal table value:

result:

entry.title: Warn users before logging them off
entry.content:
Experts,

I have 2 shifts of employees. Morning and Evening shift. Say morning shift is from 7 AM to 2 PM. If the user logs in SAP after his shift hours, I have done an enhancement in user exit SUSR0001(SMOD). This throws a popup to user that he can't login outside his shift hours and will log him off automatically. So far so good. 

Now if the morning shift employee is still in SAP past his shift hours, I have to raise a warning message that in the next 10 minutes he will be logged off asking him to save his work. My first thought is that I can simply write a background job program and achieve this. Later I realized that I can't show a popup to the user from a background job. I can send an email from the program but the chances of user opening the email is very less. 

Has anyone got a requirement like this? Any directions/pointers will be very helpful. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: eclipse find&replace ignores paste command
entry.content:
Using the latest Eclipse / ADT (but it happened also with the previous versions), I hit ctrl-F to start find&replace: I enter the "find" string "/ui2/cl_json", move to the "replace" field and hit ctrl-V, to paste the stored valued "z_ui2_json".

Nothing happens.... or rather: the field remains empty, but the text was pasted into the sourcecode at the cursor position, which is definitely NOT what I was looking for.

Can anyone else reproduce this behaviour? I'd call it a bug, or at the very least an incomplete feature.

entry.title: Where can I find all of SAP IS-H Tables in SAP System
entry.content:
Hi，

I need to ingest the tables in the HANA database of the ABAP system, but there are too many tables, so I would like to ask which ones are for the Healthcare（IS-H）

entry.title: How to extend the size of an Existing table using ABAP2XLSX
entry.content:
Subject: Extending the Size of an Existing Table with ABAP2XLSX

Body:

Hello everyone,

I'm working with ABAP2XLSX and need help extending the size of an existing table.

For example, I have a table with 5 columns and 2 rows, and I want to expand it to 20 rows. How can I achieve this?

Any suggestions or advice would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: input field editable when check box is ticked.
entry.content:
Hi All,

In CJ20n Project Builder, when i click the check box value from user status, i want a WBS field editable. 

It is standard program, so i have to do enhancement, 

Can you guide me where we exactly do enhancement? in PBO or PAI of the WBS field screen?

if so, please suggest me after what logic we can add the new peace of code which can help us to make field editable(it also needed that if user edit the WBS number that value need to update related database table, )

Note. Project is ALE distributed So is it cause any issue if user change WBS number after releasing the project?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Extração em Massa de Item text de varias RCs
entry.content:
Boa tarde!

Preciso descobrir um modo de extrair um relatório que contém o item text de vários RCs de uma vez, algo parecido com o que é possível ser feito com o ME2K e ME5A, porém os mesmos não possuem essa informação que seria o Item text da Requisição.
